verses.1: Surely God is good to Israel,
verses.2: But as for me, my feet were almost gone.
verses.3: For I was envious of the arrogant,
verses.4: For there are no struggles in their death,
verses.5: They are free from burdens of men,
verses.6: Therefore pride is like a chain around their neck.
verses.8: They scoff and speak with malice.
verses.9: They have set their mouth in the heavens.
verses.10: Therefore their people return to them,
verses.13: Surely I have cleansed my heart in vain,
verses.14: For all day long I have been plagued,
verses.15: If I had said, “I will speak thus”,
verses.16: When I tried to understand this,
verses.18: Surely you set them in slippery places.
verses.20: As a dream when one wakes up,
verses.22: I was so senseless and ignorant.
verses.23: Nevertheless, I am continually with you.
verses.24: You will guide me with your counsel,
verses.25: Whom do I have in heaven?
verses.26: My flesh and my heart fails,
verses.27: For, behold, those who are far from you shall perish.
verses.28: But it is good for me to come close to God.
